title: Zillow Group, Inc. (Z) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Zillow Group Analyst Expectations and Guidance. Recent Earnings Performance: Zillow met Wall Street's revenue expectations in Q1 2026, with sales up 18.4% year-on-year to $708 million. The company exceeded analyst expectations with an EPS of $0.53, surpassing the forecast of $0.45, and revenue of $708 million also slightly beat the anticipated $705.33 million. Forward Guidance and Analyst Estimates: Analysts expect revenue to grow 14% over the next 12 months, a slight deceleration versus the last two years. Despite this slowdown, the projection is above average for the sector and suggests the market is forecasting some success for its newer products and services. For earnings growth, over the next 12 months, Wall Street expects Zillow's full-year EPS of $0.25 to grow 229%. Analyst Ratings: 21% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy, 42% recommend Buy, 37% suggest Holding, 0% advise Selling, and 0% predict a Strong Sell. Wall Street analysts have set a price target of $81.58. Growth Outlook: Zillow is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 56.6% and 12.1% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 57% per annum.
